name: Baked Yellow Squash Pudding
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Place squash, onions, water and butter in a large kettle, cover, and simmer for 25 - 30 minutes until squash is mushy.
Uncover and simmer for an additional 10 minutes longer, mashing large pieces with a fork. Stir in all remaining ingredients.
Transfer to a buttered 3 quart gratin dish and bake, uncovered, for 2-1/2 hours until light caramel in color.
